About Us

Polyethylene packaging manufacturer with printing and converting services. Serving business clients across Bulgaria.

About the company

About Us

Polyethylene packaging manufacturer based in Asenovgrad, Bulgaria. Operating since 2014, we supply clients in retail, food industry, and industrial sectors.

We manufacture pouches to customer specification. Services include flexographic printing up to 6 colors, and converting — cutting, sealing, and perforating. We serve clients across Bulgaria.

For enquiries, we are available during business hours.

Process

How we work

01

Enquiry and specification

Submit an enquiry with dimensions, material, quantity, and print requirements. We advise on material selection where needed.

02

We make it

Printing, converting, quality control. We coordinate everything needed so you receive the finished product.

03

Dispatch

Goods are dispatched on the agreed date. Any changes are communicated in advance.

Services

What we offer

Our core manufacturing and service capabilities.

Consulting

We help you choose the right material, size, and type of packaging for your application.

Printing

Flexographic printing up to 6 colors on polyethylene film. We work from customer-supplied artwork.

Converting

Cutting, sealing, and perforating pouches to your specified dimensions.

Quality Control

Every batch checked. Thickness, seal strength, print alignment — before it ships.

Advantages

Why clients choose us

Manufacturer

You order directly from the manufacturer — no intermediaries, no reseller margin.

Flexible on volume

We accept single orders and operate ongoing supply agreements. Minimum quantities depend on product type.

On-time delivery

Agreed lead times are met. Clients are notified in advance of any changes.

Fair pricing

The quoted price is the invoiced price. No additional charges at billing.

Enquiry

Send your requirements. We respond with a quote and lead time within 1 business day.

Request a Quote

Plastic packaging manufacturer.
Bulgaria. Since 2014.
